heading: Configure an Alert
body:
To create one alert configuration in the specified project using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas alerts settings create [options]

```

To update one alert configuration in the specified project using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas alerts settings update <alertConfigId> [options]

```

To learn more about the syntax and parameters for the previous commands, see the Atlas CLI documentation for
[atlas alerts settings create](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-alerts-settings-create) and
[atlas alerts settings-update](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-alerts-settings-update).

- [Install the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/install-atlas-cli)

- [Connect to the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/connect-atlas-cli)

To list available field types for alert configurations using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas alerts settings fields type [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas alerts settings fields type](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-alerts-settings-fields-type).
